text:
暴走してる黒の民が
一気に襲ってきた時はさすがのオレも
フィナーレを覚悟したぜ……

何とか無事に帰ってきたけどよ……
だいぶヤベー訓練だと思うんだわ。

相変わらずあっさり引き受けるよな。
今回はマジであぶねえからな！

頼んどいてアレだけど
マジで無理す

When those Twilight bozos went nuts and
attacked all at once, even I figured I'd be
pushin' up daisies.

But here I am, safe and sound.
This'll be some pretty insane trainin', though.

You're taking it on like it ain't no biggie as
usual, huh. Okay, but this one's seriously
gonna put you to the test, y'know!

I know I'm the one who asked you to do it,
but... y'know...
Don't go overboard out there, pal!
